title: vicia abbreviata subsp. balansae
intro: Vicia abbreviata subsp. balansae, also known as Balansa's vetch, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the pea family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Vicia abbreviata subsp. balansae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
